skills.name: Curse of Debility
skills.description: Apply [Curse of Debility] to the enemy to damage the enemy every 1 second. Increases damage depending on the number of [Curse of Debility] stacks, and can be stacked 1 time per every 2 seconds up to 15 times. Applies [Dark Force] buff to the caster with 1 minute of duration by the chance of 30% when damages with [Curse of Debility].
skills.effect_text:
[Curse of Debility] Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 1 second
[Curse of Debility] Duration: 30 seconds
Increases damage by 2% per stack of [Curse of Debility]

skills.name: Effigy
skills.description: Damage the enemy in front which is under [Curse of Debility] by applying [Pollution].
skills.effect_text:
[Pollution] Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 2 seconds
Duration: 30 seconds

skills.name: Zombify
skills.description: Summon zombie which applies [Dark Force] to the caster every 2 seconds. You can summon only 1 zombie. Zombie can't attack nor be attacked.

skills.name: Mackangdal
skills.description: Apply buff that decreases damage received. Duration is proportional to the number of [Dark Force] stacks, and can't exceed 10 seconds.
skills.effect_text:
Decreases damage received by CaptionTime %
Duration: 0.5 seconds per number of [Dark Force] stacks (maximum 10 seconds)
- The buff duration halves in PVP.

skills.name: Bwa Kayiman
skills.description: Consume 10 stacks of [Dark Force] you have and install a magic circle that remains for 10 seconds. Increases the Physical, Magic Defense of party members standing over the magic circle, removes the [Curse of Debility], [Pollution], [Decay] debuff from the enemy, and the enemy gets damaged proportionally to the number of removed debuffs.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 1 second
Increases damage by 50% per number of Bokor debuff
Increases Physical, Magic Defense by CaptionRatio %
Duration: 10 seconds

skills.name: Samediveve
skills.description: Install a Samedi pattern that represents death noir on the ground. The enemy in range gets [Decay] debuff per every 1 second which receives damage proportionally to the number of debuffs applied by the Bokor class. Applies [Dark Force] buff to the caster which remains for 1 minute when damaged by [Decay] debuff.(Increases the number of stacks when [Dark Force] is already applied.)
skills.effect_text:
[Decay] Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 1 second
Increases damage by 30% per number of Bokor debuff
Target: 5
Duration: 10 seconds

skills.name: Damballa
skills.description: Consume 10 stacks of [Dark Force] buff you have to damage the targeted enemy.

attributes.name: Effigy: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Effigy] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Zombify: Large Zombie
attributes.description:
* Large Zombie is included in the created zombies

* Large Zombie applies [Decay] to nearby enemies every 2 seconds

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Zombify: Wheelchair Zombie
attributes.description:
* Wheelchair Zombie is included in the created zombies

* Wheelchair Zombie applies [Curse of Debility] to nearby enemies every 2 seconds

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Effigy: Blind
attributes.description:
* Enemies hit by [Pollution] have a 10% chance per attribute level of becoming afflicted with [Blind] for 5 seconds

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: [Arts] Zombify: Timed Zombies
attributes.description: * The zombie explodes when defeated and gives Magic Damage by 500% of normal attack damage to the nearby 80 range
